title: Fifth and sixth assistant district attorneys
doc_html:
§232. Fifth and sixth assistant district attorneys

           The offices of fifth and sixth assistant district attorneys for the Ninth Judicial District are hereby created.

           Added by Acts 1973, No. 118, §4.
doc_text:
§232.  Fifth and sixth assistant district attorneys
The offices of fifth and sixth assistant district attorneys for the Ninth
Judicial District are hereby created.
Added by Acts 1973, No. 118, §4.
